inputs.label: Property Value
inputs.businessContext: Current market value or purchase price of the property.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current market value or purchase price of the property.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mülkün güncel piyasa değeri veya satın alma fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Marktwert oder Kaufpreis der Immobilie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur marchande actuelle ou prix d'achat du bien.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de mercado actual o precio de compra de la propiedad.

inputs.label: Annual Gross Income
inputs.businessContext: Total projected rental income for one year before expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total projected rental income for one year before expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giderlerden önce bir yıl için tahmini toplam kira geliri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtes voraussichtliches Mieteinkommen für ein Jahr vor Ausgaben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu locatif total projeté pour une année avant dépenses.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso total proyectado por alquiler para un año antes de gastos.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total annual costs to operate the property (insurance, maintenance, taxes, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual costs to operate the property (insurance, maintenance, taxes, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mülkü işletmek için yıllık toplam maliyetler (sigorta, bakım, vergiler vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Gesamtkosten für den Betrieb der Immobilie (Versicherung, Instandhaltung, Steuern usw.).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts annuels totaux d'exploitation du bien (assurance, entretien, taxes, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos anuales totales para operar la propiedad (seguros, mantenimiento, impuestos, etc.).

inputs.label: Vacancy Rate
inputs.businessContext: Estimated vacancy and collection loss as a percentage of gross income.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated vacancy and collection loss as a percentage of gross income.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Brüt gelirin yüzdesi olarak tahmini boşluk ve tahsilat kaybı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Leerstand und Ausfallverlust als Prozentsatz des Bruttoeinkommens.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Estimation des pertes dues à l'inoccupation et aux impayés, en pourcentage du revenu brut.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje estimado de desocupación y pérdida por cobranza sobre el ingreso bruto.

inputs.label: Other Annual Income
inputs.businessContext: Additional income from sources like parking, laundry, storage, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional income from sources like parking, laundry, storage, etc.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Einnahmen aus Quellen wie Parkplätzen, Wäscherei, Lagerung usw.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenus supplémentaires provenant de sources comme le stationnement, la buanderie, le stockage, etc.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingresos adicionales de fuentes como estacionamiento, lavandería, almacenamiento, etc.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
